name: Madeonverse
notes: YC W22 company; AI-powered creative/content app for Gen Z. No confirmed HQ city found — likely SF Bay Area but not corroborated by a specific source.

name: Fiteo
notes: Retail media platform for sponsored product placement across online marketplaces. Distinct from FITEO Limited (UK furniture fittings company at fiteo.co.uk).

name: Toppings
notes: All fields already populated; echoed unchanged.

name: Uptime Health
notes: Medical device compliance and service management software. Multiple sources confirm Boston, MA HQ.

name: Letscolife
notes: Co-living platform matching homeowners with renters. Operates as CoLife at letscolife.com. Founded 2019, Charleston SC per Crunchbase.

name: Symphonie
notes: Small AI startup (2-10 employees, founded 2022). Crunchbase lists Seattle, WA.

name: Pickaxeproject
notes: No-code platform to build, share, and monetize AI tools and chatbots. Founded 2022. Crunchbase lists San Francisco; Tracxn lists Los Angeles — SF used as primary.

name: Tealeaf Health
notes: AI platform for patient engagement and acquisition connecting nonprofits/life sciences with patients via community partners. Facebook page lists San Francisco, CA.

name: Dataspan
notes: AI/Computer Vision company at 730 Arizona Ave, Santa Monica CA 90401. Distinct from DataSpan (legacy IT services, Farmers Branch TX).

name: Cloverleaf
notes: Government market intelligence platform — analyzes public meetings to surface early RFP signals for suppliers. HQ at 600 Grant St #650 Denver CO 80203.

name: Getlightswitch
notes: Small SaaS software development company (2-10 employees). Multiple data providers list Chicago, IL.

name: Aristotlehq
notes: AI-powered sales intelligence — nudges stalled leads by monitoring activity and triggering outreach at optimal moments. Founded 2023, San Francisco. Multiple sources agree on location.
